name: Flank Steak Deluxe
recipeInstructions:
1. Score the meat.
2. Mix flour, salt, and pepper; thoroughly pound into the meat.
3. Brown in hot oil.
4. Combine remaining ingredients; pour over meat and cover.
5. Cook over low heat until tender, 1 1/2 to 2 hours. (Do not cook in an electric skillet.)
6. Serve surrounded by a border of cooked rice.
7. Garnish with parsley.
Serves: 4
Source: "Mountain Measures" --Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
